hero.subtitle: Amparo is a movement that connects women in vulnerable situations to support centers, volunteers, resources, and hope — across Brazil.
hero.stat1Label: crisis pregnancies per year in Brazil
hero.stat3Label: is the time to change this

problema.label: The problem
problema.body: Vulnerable women, abuse victims, young people without family support — they all reach a critical moment without finding structured care. The debate exists. The support network doesn't.
problema.item1Text: of women in vulnerable pregnancy situations report a lack of emotional and practical support during pregnancy
problema.item2Text: organized national networks of support centers for pregnant women in crisis in Brazil — like those existing in the US for decades
problema.item3Text: christians, doctors, psychologists, lawyers, and families willing to help — but without a platform connecting them to those in need

missao.label: Our mission
missao.body: Amparo is born from the conviction that faith without works is empty. We want to build a real support network in Brazil — with physical centers, prepared volunteers, practical resources, and human presence where it matters most.
missao.quoteText: "Religion that is pure and undefiled before God the Father is this: to visit orphans and widows in their affliction."
missao.card1Text: Psychological and spiritual support for women in moments of crisis, without judgment.
missao.card2Text: A network of support centers, volunteers, doctors, and legal assistance nationwide.
missao.card3Text: Real alternatives: adoption, aid, temporary housing, and host families.

ajudar.label: How to participate
ajudar.titleNormal: There is a place for you
ajudar.body: Whether you are a volunteer, an investor, or someone wanting to open a support center — there is a way for you to take part.
ajudar.card1Text: Psychologists, lawyers, doctors, educators, social workers — your skill can change someone's story.
ajudar.card2Text: Help build the infrastructure of this network — technology, communication, team training, and national expansion.
ajudar.card3Text: Have a church, space, or organization? Help open a support point in your city with our network's backing.
ajudar.card3Link: I want to open a center →

form.label: Sign up
form.body: We are gathering the first people who will build this network with us. Leave your contact and let's talk.
form.fieldRole: How do you want to help?
form.fieldMessage: Tell us a bit about yourself (optional)
form.placeMessage: What motivated you to get interested in this project?
form.submitBtn: I want to be part of Amparo
form.note: Your data is only used for project-related contact. No spam.
form.alertError: Please fill out your name, email, and how you want to help.
form.successText: We have received your sign up. We will contact you soon to discuss how you can be part of this movement.
